title: Contemporary 3-Bedroom Beachfront Villa
blurb: A rare beachfront gem on one of Koh Samui's most secluded white-sand beaches — 28 metres of private frontage, uninterrupted sea views, and direct estate access to an 800-metre stretch of pristine shoreline, all within a 24-hour gated community.
detail:
A rare gem on one of Koh Samui's most beautiful and secluded white-sand beaches, this beachfront villa offers 28 metres of private frontage and uninterrupted sea views throughout the year. Set within an exclusive 24-hour gated residential estate with private access to an 800-metre stretch of pristine shoreline, the home combines unmatched privacy with exceptional convenience — just moments from Lamai town, yet hidden from tourist traffic. Only 200 metres down the beach, a stylish beach club offers dining, drinks and a peaceful social atmosphere, while a short stroll inland brings you to a premium sports and wellness club featuring a tennis court, gym, spa, restaurant and kids' club — with the rare benefit of room service delivered directly to your villa.

White sand and lush tropical gardens surround this serene escape, designed for rest, rejuvenation and effortless island living. In a contemporary coastal style, the villa features glass doors and windows throughout, allowing the interior to merge beautifully with the surrounding greenery and ocean views. The open-plan living, dining and kitchen area is bright and spacious, decorated in crisp whites and soft blues for a clean, modern beach aesthetic, and the fully-equipped Western kitchen provides everything needed for cooking at home — or you can enjoy meal delivery and private chef services available within the estate.

All three bedrooms come with en-suite bathrooms: two feature king beds and direct terrace access, while the third includes twin beds — ideal for family or guests. The master offers garden and sea views, with sliding glass doors leading directly to the terrace. Outside, a generous sun terrace wraps around the villa with multiple zones for lounging and dining, and a traditional Thai-style beachside sala provides the perfect spot to enjoy the morning sunrise or unwind with an evening drink while listening to the waves.

features.l: Direct access to 800 m white-sand beach
Beach club 200 m along the sand
